scripts.dev: CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=750 concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @recruit/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @recruit/api" "npm run dev -w @recruit/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @recruit/api && npm run build -w @recruit/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @recruit/api && npm run typecheck -w @recruit/web
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.infra.yml up -d mongo redis
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,worker "npm run start -w @recruit/api" "npm run start:worker -w @recruit/api"
